senses.gloss: to unite, to join, to combine

examples.english: Why didn't you call? / Why didn't you get in touch?
An Egyptian delegation arrived in Damascus

examples.text: وحكمة الكتاب المقدس، التي تفيد في كل العصور، تساعدنا أن نصل إلى هذا الهدف
examples.english: The wisdom of the Bible, which is useful in all ages, helps us reach this goal.

senses.gloss: to join, to unite, to connect
to bring, to convey, to deliver, to transport

examples.text: كي نضمِّن أن توصلنا قراراتنا في المجالات الأخلاقية إلى نتائج جيدة، لا نقدر أن نتَّكل فقط على إحساسنا أو رأي الآخرين.
examples.english: In order to ensure that our decisions in ethical areas lead to good results, we cannot rely solely on our own feelings or the opinions of others.

senses.gloss: union with the beloved object, amorous enjoyment
liaison in French, linking (consonants syllabifying across word boundaries)
